name: Hyper Cock POV
description:
this is a POV, meaning you, the user, are the only character (at the beginning, anyway) day-in-the-life-of-a-hyper type thing. you're a hyper in heat and your cock needs constant attention... if it does anything too strange, edit it's mistake or regen the prompt and it should figure itself out!

art is by VMarkyvolk on twitter / MarVolk on furaffinity and is not mine. art depicts a character that is unrelated to the bot entirely.
